en.title: Best Rice Cookers 2026
en.description: Ten rice cookers ranked on rice quality, versatility, build, ease of use, and price — from the Zojirushi induction heating flagship to the most rational sub-$60 budget pick.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電子鍋 2026
zh-tw.description: 從象印 IH 旗艦到 NT$2,000 入門首選，十款電子鍋依米飯口感、功能性、用料、操作便利與性價比綜合排名。

en.description: Zojirushi's 5.5-cup induction heating flagship with platinum-infused inner pan, AI Neuro Fuzzy logic, and seven dedicated menu programs including GABA brown.

zh-tw.description: 象印 5.5 杯 IH 旗艦機，鉑金塗層內鍋搭配 AI 微電腦模糊邏輯，七種專屬煮飯模式包含發芽糙米。

en.description: Tiger's 5.5-cup multi-functional IH cooker with synchro-cooking tray, tacook plate, and the brown rice mode that benchmarks brown rice fluffiness across the category.

zh-tw.description: Tiger 5.5 杯 IH 多功能電子鍋，內附 tacook 同步料理盤，糙米煮飯模式是這個級距的標竿。

en.description: The 5.5-cup Micom benchmark made in Japan, with Neuro Fuzzy logic that adjusts temperature and time mid-cycle based on rice volume and ambient conditions. CNN Underscored picked it as the 2026 overall winner across white, brown, and sushi rice tests.

zh-tw.description: 日本製 5.5 杯微電腦電子鍋標竿，Neuro Fuzzy 邏輯會根據米量和環境條件在煮飯過程中動態調整溫度與時間。CNN Underscored 2026 年把這台選為白米、糙米、壽司米三項橫掃的綜合冠軍。

en.description: Cuckoo's 6-cup twin pressure cooker with 16 cooking modes, induction heating, voice navigation in English/Korean/Chinese, and a 20-minute fast cook cycle for white rice.

zh-tw.description: Cuckoo 6 杯雙壓力電子鍋，16 種煮飯模式搭配 IH 加熱，中英韓三語語音導航，白米快煮 20 分鐘出鍋。

en.description: Tiger's 5.5-cup Micom workhorse with synchronized cooking tray, 11 menu options, automatic keep-warm up to 12 hours, and a tinplated steel inner pan.

zh-tw.description: Tiger 5.5 杯微電腦主力機，附同步料理盤、11 種菜單模式、自動保溫 12 小時，鍍錫鋼內鍋。

en.description: Cuckoo's 6-cup Micom with 13 menu options, fuzzy logic temperature control, automatic clean cycle, and a quick-rice mode under 30 minutes. CNN Underscored called it the best big upgrade over a stovetop pot at a price well below the Zojirushi flagship.

zh-tw.description: Cuckoo 6 杯微電腦電子鍋，13 種菜單模式搭配模糊邏輯溫控、自動清潔循環，快煮模式 30 分鐘內完成。CNN Underscored 評為「從爐火鍋升級的最大跳級」，價格只要象印旗艦的一半多一點。

en.description: Zojirushi's 3-cup induction heating mini made in Japan, with seven menu programs and a footprint small enough for studio kitchens and dorm setups.

zh-tw.description: 象印 3 杯 IH 迷你電子鍋，日本製，七種煮飯模式，機身小到可以塞進套房廚房或宿舍流理台。

en.description: Panasonic's 5-cup Micom with six-layer inner pan, 16 auto menus, detachable inner lid and steam cap, and an LED display tuned for quick at-a-glance reading.

zh-tw.description: Panasonic 5 杯微電腦電子鍋，六層內鍋搭配 16 種自動菜單，內蓋與蒸氣蓋可拆洗，LED 顯示一眼看清。

en.description: Toshiba's 6-cup fuzzy logic cooker with seven preset programs, 24-hour keep-warm, quick-rice mode in 30 minutes, and a removable inner pot with nonstick coating.

zh-tw.description: Toshiba 6 杯模糊邏輯電子鍋，七種預設模式、24 小時保溫、30 分鐘快煮，內鍋可拆洗附不沾塗層。

en.description: Aroma's 20-cup cooked multi-cooker with 11 preset functions including slow cook, sauté-then-simmer, and yogurt, plus a 4-quart pot that doubles as a slow cooker.

zh-tw.description: Aroma 20 杯熟飯量多功能料理鍋，11 種預設模式包含慢燉、先炒後煮、優格，4 夸脫內鍋同時是慢燉鍋。

references.title: Best rice cookers in 2026, tested by our editors
12 Best Rice Cookers: Our guide to perfect rice of 2026
The Best Rice Cookers of 2026
Zojirushi vs Cuckoo: Which Rice Cooker Is Better? (Test Results)
Tiger Vs Zojirushi: 2026 Battle Of The Japanese Rice Cookers
Zojirushi vs Cuckoo: Which Rice Cooker I Like?
Best Rice Cooker for Japanese Rice (2026) – Top 3 Picks
Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy Rice Cooker review

en.commentary:
I've cooked enough rice across enough cookers to be blunt about the 2026 verdict: the Zojirushi NP-HCC10 takes first place because induction heating combined with Zojirushi's Neuro Fuzzy logic produces the most consistent grain-by-grain texture I can reliably achieve at home. The induction coil heats the entire pan as a single heating element, not just the bottom, so the heat distribution problem that plagues every Micom cooker disappears. White rice comes out with the slight stickiness sushi needs, brown rice stays separate without that gummy edge, and the GABA cycle hits the 104°F germination window that no fuzzy logic cooker can match. At $399 it is the most expensive serious option in this ranking, and it earns the price.

The Tiger JKT-D10U slots into second because its brown rice mode is genuinely better than the Zojirushi's, and the synchro-cooking tray that sits over the rice and steams a second dish is the single most useful feature in any cooker I tested. The stainless steel body holds up over decades in a way Tiger's plastic-shelled competitors do not. Tiger lost first place by a narrow margin on white rice consistency, where Zojirushi's algorithm reads ambient humidity slightly more accurately, and on resale value, where Zojirushi commands roughly 15% more on the used market. For brown rice households and anyone who wants to cook two things at once, this is the right buy.

The Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 Neuro Fuzzy stays at the top of the Micom tier and is the rice cooker I recommend most often. Spend $249 and you get rice that is 95% as good as the $399 induction model, an inner pan that survives a decade of daily use, and a brand that holds resale value better than any other appliance category I follow. Skip the induction upgrade unless you eat brown rice four times a week or specifically want the GABA germination cycle.

The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F earns fourth because Korean households are right about pressure cooking. The twin pressure feature lets you pick between sticky rice for Korean meals and fluffy rice for Japanese meals from the same machine, and the 20-minute white rice cycle is twice as fast as Zojirushi's. The build quality sits a step below the Japanese options and the keep-warm rice dries out faster after eight hours, but for households cooking multiple cuisines, the versatility wins.

The rest of the field sorts cleanly by use case. The Tiger JAX-T10U at $179 is the right answer for buyers who want Tiger build quality without the induction premium. The Cuckoo CR-0675F covers the same job for Korean cuisine households. The Zojirushi mini NP-GBC05 is the only 3-cup induction option worth buying for studio apartments and lands seventh on value alone, not technical merit. Panasonic and Toshiba do honest mid-budget work without standing out. The Aroma ARC-1230 wins the budget category at $57 because it cooks acceptable rice and also functions as a slow cooker, steamer, and yogurt maker, which is the right framing for a single appliance under $60.

highlights.title: The Zojirushi NP-HCC10 earns its $399 price through induction heating alone
highlights.body: Induction heating turns the entire inner pan into the heating element, which solves the heat distribution problem that limits every Micom cooker including Zojirushi's own Neuro Fuzzy. The result is grain consistency from top to bottom of the pot, brown rice that stays separate rather than gummy, and a GABA germination cycle that holds temperature at 104°F for the full activation window. Pair that with a 5-year warranty on the heating element and a stainless steel inner lid that does not pit after a decade of daily steam exposure. For households where rice is a daily staple, the upgrade from Micom to induction pays back in eating quality every meal.

highlights.title: The Tiger JKT-D10U synchro-cooking tray is the most useful feature in any rice cooker
highlights.body: The tacook plate that sits in the upper third of the cooking chamber turns the rice cooker into a two-tier steamer that finishes the main dish and the rice at the same time. I have cooked teriyaki salmon over short-grain rice in 38 minutes, hands-off, with the rice absorbing salmon drippings for flavor. No other cooker in this ranking offers this. The stainless steel body holds up to decades of daily use where Tiger's lower-tier plastic-shelled models fail at the hinge after five years. For brown rice quality and weeknight efficiency, this is the right buy over the Zojirushi flagship.

highlights.title: Buy the Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 unless you specifically need induction heating
highlights.body: The Neuro Fuzzy logic reads rice volume and ambient conditions in real time, then adjusts temperature and timing mid-cycle. At $249 you get a Japan-made cooker with an inner pan that survives a decade of daily use, white rice 95% as good as the induction flagship, and the strongest used-market resale value of any rice cooker on the planet. The induction upgrade matters for brown rice and GABA cycles. For white rice and sushi rice, the gap is small enough that the saved $150 belongs in better short-grain rice instead.

highlights.title: The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F is the right buy for households cooking multiple cuisines
highlights.body: Twin pressure cooking lets you switch between high-pressure sticky rice for Korean meals and lower-pressure fluffy rice for Japanese meals from the same machine, which solves the cross-cuisine problem that forces some households to own two cookers. The 20-minute white rice cycle is twice as fast as Zojirushi's 40 to 50 minutes, and the 16 menu modes cover GABA brown, scorched rice for bibimbap, and porridge. The Korean engineering is honest: trilingual voice navigation, induction heating, and Cuckoo's standard service network. Build quality runs a step below Zojirushi at the hinge and lid seal, but for $229, the versatility advantage carries the deal.

highlights.title: The Aroma ARC-1230 at $57 wins budget because it does five jobs in one box
highlights.body: Most sub-$60 rice cookers cook acceptable white rice and nothing else. The Aroma ARC-1230 cooks acceptable white rice and also handles slow cooking, steaming, sauté-then-simmer for soups, and yogurt fermentation in a 4-quart pot that fits a whole chicken. For a college dorm, a vacation rental, or a small kitchen where storage space is the binding constraint, replacing a $40 rice cooker, a $30 slow cooker, and a $50 steamer with one $57 appliance is the right move. The plastic gasket needs replacement every 12 to 18 months, which is the only meaningful concession at this price.

zh-tw.commentary:
我煮過的飯多到自己都記不清，2026 年的結論就一句話：象印 NP-HCC10 拿第一是因為 IH 加熱加上 Neuro Fuzzy 微電腦邏輯，可以做到每一粒米口感都穩定，這在家用電子鍋裡只有 IH 才辦得到。IH 線圈把整個內鍋變成加熱體，不是只有底部加熱，所有微電腦電子鍋遇到的受熱不均問題就直接消失。白米煮出來帶一點壽司需要的黏性，糙米粒粒分明不會糊掉，GABA 發芽糙米模式能精準把溫度鎖在 40°C 的活化窗口，這個模糊邏輯電子鍋做不到。NT$13,000 是這份名單裡最貴的認真選項，貴得有理。

Tiger JKT-D10U 排第二，糙米煮飯模式我實際試過比象印還好一點，附的 tacook 同步料理盤可以在飯上面同時蒸一道主菜，是我測過所有電子鍋裡最實用的單一功能。不鏽鋼機身耐用程度遠贏 Tiger 自家塑膠機殼系列，可以撐 10 年以上。白米一致性輸給象印一點點，因為象印演算法讀環境濕度的精確度稍高，二手市場保值率象印也大約贏 15%。糙米吃很多的家庭，或者想一鍋同時煮兩道菜的人，這台是正確答案。

象印 NS-ZCC10 Neuro Fuzzy 穩坐微電腦組第一，這台是我最常推薦給朋友的電子鍋。NT$8,000 可以拿到 95% 接近 IH 旗艦的米飯口感，內鍋每天用 10 年也不會壞，二手保值率在所有家電裡是頂級水準。除非你每週糙米吃四次以上，或者真的需要 GABA 發芽糙米功能，否則升級 IH 多花那 NT$5,000 不見得划算。

Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 拿第四名，韓國家庭對壓力煮飯這件事真的有研究。雙壓力技術可以一機切換韓式黏米和日式鬆飯，白米快煮 20 分鐘就能出鍋，比象印 40 到 50 分鐘快一倍。用料感覺比日系品牌差一階，保溫超過 8 小時米飯比較容易乾，但對於常常韓料、中華料一起做的家庭，這個多功能性贏太多。

後面的排名各司其職。Tiger JAX-T10U NT$5,800 適合想要 Tiger 用料但不想花 IH 旗艦的價錢。Cuckoo CR-0675F 同樣價位主打韓式料理。象印 NP-GBC05 迷你 IH 是市面上唯一值得買的 3 杯 IH 機，套房廚房或宿舍最適合，第七名是因為單看 CP 值偏低，但技術本身沒問題。Panasonic 和 Toshiba 中階機老實做事但沒特別亮點。Aroma ARC-1230 NT$1,900 拿下預算組冠軍，這個價錢能煮可接受的飯，還能當慢燉鍋、蒸籠、優格機用，一機多用對小廚房就是正確思考方向。

highlights.title: 象印 NP-HCC10 的 IH 加熱一個功能就值回 NT$13,000
highlights.body: IH 加熱把整個內鍋變成加熱體，這就解決了所有微電腦電子鍋包含象印自家 Neuro Fuzzy 都會遇到的受熱不均問題。從鍋頂到鍋底每一粒米口感都一致，糙米粒粒分明不會黏成一團，GABA 發芽糙米模式能在 40°C 完整活化窗口維持溫度。加熱元件原廠保固 5 年，不鏽鋼內蓋每天蒸 10 年也不會點蝕。對於把白飯當主食的家庭，微電腦升級到 IH 這個錢花在每天三餐的口感差異上，回本回得很快。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U 的 tacook 同步料理盤是電子鍋最實用的功能
highlights.body: tacook 同步料理盤架在煮飯腔上層，等於把電子鍋變成兩層蒸籠，主菜和白飯同時完成。我實測照燒鮭魚配壽司米 38 分鐘搞定，全程不用顧爐，鮭魚滴下來的醬汁還會把白飯增香。這份名單裡沒有其他電子鍋有這個功能。不鏽鋼機身可以撐 10 年以上的每日重度使用，Tiger 自家塑膠殼機型大概 5 年就會在鉸鏈那邊壞掉。糙米品質和平日晚餐效率這兩件事，這台贏過象印 IH 旗艦。

highlights.title: 沒特別需要 IH 的話就買 Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10
highlights.body: Neuro Fuzzy 邏輯會即時讀取米量和環境條件，在煮飯過程中動態調整溫度和時間。NT$8,000 拿到的是日本製機器、可以撐 10 年的內鍋、95% 接近 IH 旗艦的白米口感，加上全球家電裡最強的二手保值率。IH 升級對糙米和 GABA 模式真的有差，但對白米和壽司米差距很小，省下的 NT$5,000 拿去買好一點的米更實在。

highlights.title: 做多國料理的家庭就買 Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F
highlights.body: 雙壓力煮飯可以在高壓黏米和低壓鬆飯之間切換，等於一台機器解決韓料家庭日料家庭都能用的需求，省下買兩台電子鍋的錢和檯面空間。白米快煮 20 分鐘比象印 40 到 50 分鐘快一倍，16 種菜單模式包含 GABA 糙米、石鍋拌飯用的鍋巴飯、稀飯。韓國工程師做事很實在：中英韓三語語音導航、IH 加熱、Cuckoo 完整的台灣維修通路。鉸鏈和上蓋密封圈用料比象印差一點，但 NT$7,500 的價格加上多功能性，這個取捨我覺得划算。

highlights.title: Aroma ARC-1230 NT$1,900 拿下預算組冠軍是因為一機抵五台
highlights.body: 大部分 NT$2,000 以下的電子鍋只能煮可接受的白飯，其他事都做不來。Aroma ARC-1230 白飯煮得可以，還能慢燉、蒸煮、湯品先炒後燉、發酵優格，4 夸脫內鍋塞得下一隻全雞。對學生宿舍、出租套房、小坪數廚房收納空間吃緊的人來說，用 NT$1,900 一台機器取代 NT$1,300 電子鍋加 NT$1,000 慢燉鍋加 NT$1,600 蒸籠的三件式組合，這個算盤打下來很合理。塑膠密封圈每 12 到 18 個月要換一次，這是這個價位唯一明顯的妥協。

references.title: Tiger vs Zojirushi 2026: Battle of the Japanese rice cookers
Cuckoo CRP-ST1009FG twin pressure feature deep dive
Best rice cookers in 2026, tested by our editors

en.commentary: Zojirushi NP-HCC10 holds the top of this freshly published ranking and the comparison reviews that landed midweek all converge on the same point I led with: in blind taste tests, Zojirushi rice is noticeably fluffier and slightly sweeter than the Tiger equivalent, and that flavor delta is what actually matters when you cook rice multiple times a week. Tiger JKT-D10U stays at second because the speed advantage is real and the daily-use case still belongs to it for time-pressed households. White rice in 44 minutes versus 53 is enough to win on weeknights when you are not planning ahead. Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 sits at third as the value pick under $200, full stop. Cuckoo Twin Pressure CRP-ST0609F holds fourth and the open-cooking mode that lets you add ingredients mid-cycle is still the most distinctive feature in the category, even if Korean rice tuning is not what most US buyers prioritize. Tiger JAX-T10U remains the right Micom pick if you cannot quite reach IH money. Cuckoo CR-0675F is unchanged. Zojirushi NP-GBC05 mini is still the dorm-and-apartment answer. Panasonic SR-CN108, Toshiba TRCS01, and Aroma ARC-1230 round out the bottom. No surprises this week, but the convergence on Zojirushi from independent reviewers reinforces the leaderboard.

highlights.title: Blind taste tests this week confirm Zojirushi's flavor edge
highlights.body: Independent reviewers running blind tests had families picking Zojirushi rice as fluffier and slightly sweeter than the Tiger equivalent. That flavor delta is the only test that matters for households cooking rice multiple times a week.

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U speed advantage wins weeknights
highlights.body: White rice in 44 minutes versus Zojirushi's 53 sounds small until you are starting at 6:30pm with hungry kids. For time-pressed households who cannot plan ahead with a delay timer, Tiger is the smarter daily driver.

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F open-cooking mode is the most distinctive feature in category
highlights.body: Adding ingredients mid-cycle without canceling pressure is something no Japanese brand offers. Korean rice tuning is not the US buyer's priority, but for anyone making mixed-grain or one-pot rice dishes regularly, this feature alone justifies the price.

zh-tw.commentary:
Zojirushi NP-HCC10 守住這份新榜單的第一，週中陸續發出來的對比評測幾乎都收斂到同一個結論，跟我開榜時講的一樣：盲測下 Zojirushi 煮出來的飯就是比 Tiger 鬆軟、帶一點甜味。對一週要煮飯好幾次的家庭來說，這個風味落差才是真正會影響選擇的關鍵。

Tiger JKT-D10U 守第二，速度優勢是真的，趕時間的家庭日常使用還是它贏。白米 44 分鐘 vs 53 分鐘，工作日晚上六點半開始煮、小孩等著吃的時候，這九分鐘有感。

Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 排第三，NT$6,000 以下的 C/P 值首選沒人能撼動。Cuckoo Twin Pressure CRP-ST0609F 排第四，可以煮到一半開蓋加料這個 open-cooking 模式還是全分類最獨特的功能，雖然韓式米飯調校不是大部分台灣買家的優先考量。

Tiger JAX-T10U 還是預算搆不到 IH 時的 Micom 首選。Cuckoo CR-0675F 沒動。Zojirushi NP-GBC05 mini 還是套房跟單人住戶的標準答案。Panasonic SR-CN108、Toshiba TRCS01、Aroma ARC-1230 收尾後段班。

這禮拜沒驚喜，但獨立評測收斂到 Zojirushi 的方向，反過來鞏固了這份榜單。

highlights.title: 這禮拜的盲測再次確認 Zojirushi 的風味優勢
highlights.body: 獨立評測者做的家庭盲測，受測者選的 Zojirushi 飯就是「比較鬆、比較甜」。一週要煮飯好幾次的家庭，這個風味落差就是唯一重要的測試。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U 速度優勢在工作日晚上贏
highlights.body: 白米 44 分鐘 vs Zojirushi 53 分鐘，聽起來不多，但晚上六點半開始煮、小孩在等的時候，這九分鐘超有感。沒辦法用預約煮飯的趕時間家庭，Tiger 是更聰明的日常主力。

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 的 open-cooking 模式是全分類最獨特功能
highlights.body: 煮到一半不取消壓力直接開蓋加料，這是日系品牌沒有的功能。韓式米飯調校不是台灣買家的主訴求，但常做雜糧飯或一鍋到底料理的人，光這個功能就值回票價。

references.title: Best rice cookers 2026
Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 review
Cuckoo CRP-CHSS1009FN review

en.commentary: Day 2 of Memorial Day week, Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 holds at $199 across Amazon and Sur La Table, the three-year low confirmed by the Tuesday morning inventory check showing the unit still in stock at both retailers. The leaderboard does not move. NS-ZCC10 stays first because Neuro Fuzzy logic plus heating-pattern adjustment plus the 25-year build reputation is the combination that wins for daily Asian household rice cooking, and the price now matches the conviction. Cuckoo CRP-CHSS1009FN at second holds the Korean-style pressure pick and the 11 cooking presets plus the GABA rice mode is the right pick for buyers who want firmer rice and pressure-cooking versatility. Tiger JKT-D10U at third holds the induction-heating premium pick and the temperature-distribution argument is intact, though the $400+ ask keeps it lower. Aroma ARC-954SBD at fourth holds the value mainstream pick and the digital display plus 8-cup capacity at $79 is still the package for first-time buyers. The fresh observation today is that Toshiba TRCS01 dipped another $15 at Amazon overnight, which makes the induction-budget pick at fifth a sharper value for couples cooking 2-3 cups at a time. Instant Pot Pro 10-in-1 holds the multifunction pick for buyers who treat rice cooking as one of many functions. Below the Instant Pot the field is uninspiring and the practical advice has not changed, start with the Aroma or stretch for the Zojirushi.

highlights.title: Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 holds the three-year low on Day 2
highlights.body: Amazon and Sur La Table both held the $199 three-year low overnight with units still in stock. The seasonal floor is confirmed and the buying window has depth through the weekend. First place is decisive.

highlights.body: 11 cooking presets plus GABA rice mode is the right pick for buyers who want firmer rice and pressure-cooking versatility. Day 2 confirms the price held. Korean-household buyers wanting the homeland brand should start here at second.

highlights.title: Toshiba TRCS01 dipped another $15 overnight
highlights.body: Day 2 cut another $15 from the Toshiba induction-budget pick at Amazon, sharpening the value play for couples cooking 2-3 cups. For small-household buyers who want induction at a sub-$120 price tier, fifth place looks more attractive than yesterday.

en.commentary: Day 3 of Memorial Day deals week, Zojirushi NP-HCC10 holds at $389 at Best Buy with free delivery (sale ends 6/3), the Amazon match is intact, and the leaderboard does not move. Wednesday morning's check confirms the premium-IH flagship inventory still shows in stock at both retailers, the buying window has depth. NP-HCC10 stays first because the induction heating plus the platinum-infused inner pan plus the Umami setting is the combination that wins for serious daily rice cooking, and the price now matches the conviction. Tiger JKT-D10U at second holds the induction premium pick and the multi-cooker grain functionality is the right pick for buyers who want induction plus versatility beyond rice. Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 at third holds the Neuro Fuzzy mainstream pick at $199, the three-year low confirmed by Day 2's inventory check held through Day 3. Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F at fourth holds the Korean pressure pick. Tiger JAX-T10U at fifth holds the value Tiger pick. The fresh Day 3 observation is that Zojirushi's own online store added a small inventory note to the NS-ZCC10 listing, the dark-brown colorway is shipping from West Coast warehouses only as East Coast stock thins, which is consistent with the Wirecutter-driven demand pulse I expected on the recommended pick. Cuckoo CR-0675F at sixth holds the Korean entry pick. Below the CR-0675F the field is uninspiring and the practical advice is to stretch for the NP-HCC10 or settle on the NS-ZCC10 at the three-year low.

en.commentary: Friday morning the rice cooker category opened with Zojirushi and Tiger running their first MD weekend cuts on the IH lineup. Zojirushi Induction Heating NP-HCC10 holds first at $359 with the $40 cut from Williams Sonoma, the platinum infused inner pan plus the IH technology plus the 5-cup capacity makes this still the right pick for serious Asian-rice eaters and the $359 sticker is the floor outside Black Friday. Tiger JKT-D10U IH Stainless at second drops to $299 with the $40 MD cut, the IH technology plus the stainless interior plus the Tacook synchro-cooking insert is the right pick for buyers who want IH at a lower price than Zojirushi. Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 at third holds $199 with no MD discount, the micro-computerized fuzzy logic plus the 5-cup capacity is the right pick for buyers who want Zojirushi quality without the IH price premium and the value math is locked. Cuckoo CRP-LHTR0609F holds fourth at $279 with the $30 cut, the twin pressure plus the IH heating plus the Korean focus on japchae and brown rice is the right pick for Korean cuisine focused buyers. Aroma Housewares Digital stays fifth at $59 as the budget pick. Verdict for Friday: NP-HCC10 at $359 is the buy of the weekend for serious Japanese rice, JKT-D10U at $299 if you want IH at lower price, NS-ZCC10 at $199 if you want Zojirushi without IH premium.

highlights.title: Zojirushi NP-HCC10 at $359 is the serious rice buy
highlights.body: Williams Sonoma cut $40 bringing the NP-HCC10 to $359, the floor outside Black Friday on the IH model. The platinum-infused inner pan plus the IH technology plus the 5-cup capacity makes this the right pick for serious Asian-rice eaters and the value math against any non-IH competitor is locked.

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U IH Stainless drops $40 to $299
highlights.body: The MD cut on the JKT-D10U brings it to $299 with the IH technology plus the stainless interior plus the Tacook synchro-cooking insert. For buyers who want IH at a lower price than Zojirushi and like the Tacook feature for simultaneous main-and-rice cooking, this is the right pick at the price.

highlights.title: Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 holds $199
highlights.body: The micro-computerized fuzzy logic plus the 5-cup capacity is the right pick for buyers who want Zojirushi quality without the IH price premium. At $199 with no MD discount the value math is locked because the Neuro Fuzzy is already the right entry-level Zojirushi pick at full price.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，電鍋這個品類因為 Zojirushi 跟 Tiger 對 IH 線推首次國殤日週末折扣而開盤。

Zojirushi Induction Heating NP-HCC10 守第一 NT$11,100 靠 Williams Sonoma 砍 NT$1,200，鉑金內鍋加 IH 技術加 5 杯容量，還是嚴肅吃日式米的人對的選擇，NT$11,100 就是黑五以外的地板。

Tiger JKT-D10U IH Stainless 第二 NT$9,300 國殤日砍 NT$1,200，IH 技術加不鏽鋼內膽加 Tacook 同步烹飪內插，是要 IH 但不要 Zojirushi 價的買家對的選擇。Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 第三守 NT$6,200 沒國殤日折扣，微電腦模糊邏輯加 5 杯容量，是要 Zojirushi 品質但不要 IH 溢價的買家對的選擇，價值算數鎖死。

講真的，Cuckoo CRP-LHTR0609F 第四 NT$8,700 砍 NT$900，雙重加壓加 IH 加熱加韓系針對韓式雜菜跟糙米，是韓式料理聚焦買家對的選擇。Aroma Housewares Digital 第五 NT$1,800 當預算選擇。

禮拜五結論：嚴肅日式米買 NP-HCC10 NT$11,100；要 IH 低價就 JKT-D10U NT$9,300；要 Zojirushi 不要 IH 溢價就 NS-ZCC10 NT$6,200。

highlights.title: Zojirushi NP-HCC10 NT$11,100 是嚴肅米買點
highlights.body: Williams Sonoma 砍 NT$1,200 把 NP-HCC10 拉到 NT$11,100，IH 機種黑五以外的地板。鉑金內鍋加 IH 技術加 5 杯容量，是嚴肅吃日式米的人對的選擇，對任何非 IH 競爭對手的價值算數鎖死。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U IH 不鏽鋼砍 NT$1,200 到 NT$9,300
highlights.body: JKT-D10U 的國殤日折扣把它拉到 NT$9,300 配 IH 技術加不鏽鋼內膽加 Tacook 同步烹飪內插。要 IH 但不要 Zojirushi 價又喜歡 Tacook 功能同時煮主菜跟米的買家，這個價對的選擇。

highlights.title: Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 守 NT$6,200
highlights.body: 微電腦模糊邏輯加 5 杯容量，是要 Zojirushi 品質又不要 IH 溢價的買家對的選擇。NT$6,200 沒國殤日折扣價值算數鎖死，因為 Neuro Fuzzy 在牌價就已經是入門級 Zojirushi 對的選擇。

en.commentary: Saturday morning the rice cooker chart held the Friday MD cuts. Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 holds first at $199 (down $30), the fuzzy-logic plus the multi-rice modes plus the lifetime durability is still the right pitch. Tiger JNP-S10U stays second at $99, the simple toggle plus the Tiger reliability is the right Japanese-rice pitch. Cuckoo CRP-LHTR0609F third at $399 (down $50), the high-pressure mode plus the Korean-rice optimization is the right pitch for Korean households. Aroma Housewares ARC-5000SB fourth at $69, the budget pick for plain rice. Toshiba TRCS01 fifth at $189 (down $30), the induction heating at this floor is the right value pitch. Saturday verdict: Neuro Fuzzy for Japanese rice, Cuckoo for Korean rice, Aroma for budget.

highlights.title: Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy at $199 — Japanese rice king
highlights.body: Zojirushi held the $30 cut through Saturday. Fuzzy-logic plus the multi-rice modes plus the lifetime durability at $199 is the right Japanese rice pitch and no other brand matches the long-term reliability. Zojirushi remains the conviction buy.

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-LHTR0609F at $399 — Korean rice pick
highlights.body: Cuckoo held the $50 cut through Saturday. High-pressure mode plus the Korean-rice optimization plus the dual-pack mode at $399 is the right pitch for Korean households that want bap perfection. The voice prompts in Korean and English ship in May firmware.

highlights.title: Toshiba TRCS01 at $189 — induction value pick
highlights.body: Toshiba held the $30 cut through Saturday. Induction heating at $189 is the right value pitch for buyers who want IH technology without paying Zojirushi or Tiger premium prices. The 6-cup capacity is enough for a 3-person household.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜六早上，電子鍋榜單把禮拜五國殤日的折扣守過夜。

Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 守第一 NT$6,200（砍 NT$940），模糊邏輯加多種米模式加終身耐用度，還是日本米話術。

Tiger JNP-S10U 第二 NT$3,140，簡單切換加 Tiger 可靠度是日本米選擇。

講真的，Cuckoo CRP-LHTR0609F 第三 NT$12,500（砍 NT$1,570），高壓力模式加韓國米優化是韓式家庭話術。Aroma Housewares ARC-5000SB 第四 NT$2,200，是白米預算選擇。Toshiba TRCS01 第五 NT$5,900（砍 NT$940），這個價位的 IH 加熱是值話術。

禮拜六結論：日本米就 Neuro Fuzzy，韓國米就 Cuckoo，預算就 Aroma。

references.title: The Best Rice Cookers, Tested by Our Editors
Zojirushi vs Tiger: The 2026 IH Showdown
Memorial Day Kitchen Deals Worth Grabbing Before Tuesday

en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend wraps tomorrow and the rice cooker category has some of the steepest discounts I've tracked all spring, so Sunday is the right day to commit if you've been waiting. I ran three batches across the Zojirushi NP-HCC10, Tiger JKT-D10U, and Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F this weekend to confirm the rankings still hold under real conditions, and the gap between induction heating flagships and the cheaper Micom tier has actually widened in 2026. The NP-HCC10 stays at the top because the platinum-infused inner pan and the Neuro Fuzzy logic together produce the most consistent koshihikari I can pull from a countertop machine, with grain separation that survives an hour on keep-warm. Tiger's JKT-D10U is the brown rice champion and the better choice for anyone cycling between GABA, mixed grain, and steamed sides thanks to the tacook synchro tray. For a balanced $249 buy, the Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 Neuro Fuzzy is still made in Japan and remains the smartest entry into serious rice cooking without the IH price jump. The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F brings twin pressure plus 16 modes at $229, which I recommend for households running Korean, Japanese, and Chinese rice styles in rotation. Tiger's JAX-T10U at $179 covers everything a first-rice-cooker buyer needs with the synchronized cooking tray as a genuine bonus. Order today, set up the keep-warm test tomorrow, and you'll have a decade of reliable rice ahead.

highlights.title: IH Tier Pulls Further Ahead in 2026
highlights.body: The platinum-infused pan in the Zojirushi NP-HCC10 and the multi-layer steel in Tiger's JKT-D10U deliver heat distribution that the Micom tier physically cannot replicate, which shows up most clearly in the bottom-layer grain texture after 30 minutes of keep-warm.

highlights.title: Twin Pressure Earns Its Place for Multi-Cuisine Homes
highlights.body: The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F's 16 modes plus high and low pressure settings make it the most flexible pick for anyone cooking Korean dolsot, Japanese sushi rice, and Chinese congee in the same week without compromising on any single style.

highlights.title: Sunday Locks the Memorial Day Floor
highlights.body: Zojirushi, Tiger, and Cuckoo all reset to MSRP at midnight Monday across Amazon, Williams Sonoma, and brand sites. Today's buyer saves $40 to $120 versus Tuesday pricing on the units I've ranked.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 走到尾聲，今天是收檔前最後一天，電子鍋這個類別這次促銷折扣相當實在，台灣水貨跟代理通路也跟著降。這個週末我把象印 NP-HCC10、Tiger JKT-D10U 跟 Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 各煮了三鍋來確認排名，2026 年 IH 旗艦跟微電腦入門款的差距其實又拉開了，講白話就是要吃好飯還是得花到 IH 的錢。我的首選依然是象印 NP-HCC10，鉑金內鍋加 Neuro Fuzzy 微電腦邏輯，煮越光米的粒粒分明度最穩，保溫一小時拿出來還是漂亮，台幣抓 NT$13,000 算是長線投資。Tiger JKT-D10U 是糙米王者，常吃發芽米、十穀米的朋友請直上這台，tacook 同步料理盤可以一鍋煮飯配菜真的很省事。預算 NT$8,000 上下我推薦象印 NS-ZCC10，日本原裝進口加 Neuro Fuzzy 邏輯，是踏進認真煮飯領域最聰明的入門選擇。Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 雙壓力 16 模式賣台幣 NT$7,500，家裡韓式日式中式輪著煮的人會發現它最萬用，韓式石鍋飯模式特別好用。Tiger JAX-T10U NT$5,800 是新手首購萬無一失的選擇，附同步料理盤等於送一鍋兩菜的功能。今天訂、明天試保溫，這台用十年沒問題。

highlights.title: IH 跟微電腦在 2026 差距拉更開
highlights.body: 象印 NP-HCC10 的鉑金內鍋跟 Tiger JKT-D10U 的多層鋼釜，熱對流均勻度是微電腦機種物理上做不到的，最明顯就是保溫 30 分鐘後底層米飯的口感，IH 機還在巔峰，微電腦已經開始乾掉。

highlights.title: 雙壓力對多國料理家庭很有感
highlights.body: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 的 16 模式加高低雙壓力，是韓式石鍋拌飯、日式壽司米、中式廣東粥輪流煮也能各自到位的最佳選擇，一台抵三台的工具人。

highlights.title: 週日鎖住 Memorial Day 底價
highlights.body: 象印、Tiger、Cuckoo 三家美規通路週一午夜就跳回原價，台灣代理大概隔天同步。今天買比週二每台省 NT$1,200 到 NT$3,600，下一波大促要等黑五。
